title: Lyra-2 WAN Network Architecture

classes.name: Lyra2WanModel
classes.docstring: WAN backbone with Lyra2 modifications. Adds clean patch embeddings, camera/buffer conditioning, framepack path.
key_methods: __init__(model_type, patch_size, text_len, in_dim, dim, ffn_dim, freq_dim, text_dim, out_dim, num_heads, num_layers, window_size, qk_norm, cross_attn_norm, eps, concat_padding_mask, sac_config, cp_comm_type, use_plucker_condition, buffer_in_dim, buffer_sincos_multires, inject_kq_only, ...)
forward(x_B_C_T_H_W, timesteps_B_T, crossattn_emb, seq_len, frame_cond_crossattn_emb_B_L_D, y_B_C_T_H_W, y_buffer_B_C_T_H_W, padding_mask, is_uncond, slg_layers, **kwargs) -> Tensor

classes.name: Lyra2AttentionBlock
classes.docstring: Attention block based on WanAttentionBlock with optional camera (Plücker) and buffer embedding injection.
key_methods: __init__(cross_attn_type, dim, ffn_dim, num_heads, window_size, qk_norm, cross_attn_norm, eps, cp_comm_type, cam_dim, buffer_dim, buffer_sincos_multires, inject_kq_only, buffer_mlp_squeeze_dim)
forward(x, e, seq_lens, video_size, freqs, context, context_lens, camera=None, buffer=None) -> Tensor

classes.name: VideoPositionEmb
classes.docstring: Abstract base class for video positional embeddings; supports context parallelism.

classes.name: VideoRopePosition3DEmb
classes.docstring: 3D Rotary Position Embedding for (T, H, W) video tokens using NTK-aware scaling.
key_methods: __init__(head_dim, len_h, len_w, len_t, h_extrapolation_ratio, w_extrapolation_ratio, t_extrapolation_ratio)
generate_embeddings(B_T_H_W_C, h_ntk_factor, w_ntk_factor, t_ntk_factor) -> Tensor  # shape (T*H*W,1,1,D)

classes.name: Wan2pt1CLIPEmbLyra2
classes.docstring: Lyra2-aware CLIP embedder wrapping CLIPModel for frame conditioning.
key_methods: forward(image_tensor, video_tensor, media_latents, mask, buffer_latents) -> Dict[str, Tensor]

classes.name: WeightTrainingStat
classes.docstring: Base mixin for weight training statistics tracking.

classes.name: AbstractEmbModel
classes.docstring: Abstract base for all embedding/conditioner models.

classes.name: Head
classes.docstring: Output head: LayerNorm + Linear with modulation for patch unpacking.

classes.name: MLPProj
classes.docstring: MLP projection for CLIP image embeddings (i2v / flf2v).
key_attributes: emb_pos: nn.Parameter  # optional, flf2v only, shape (1,N,1280)

classes.name: WanSelfAttention
key_methods: forward(x, seq_lens, video_size, freqs, kq_bias=None) -> Tensor

classes.name: CLIPModel
key_methods: visual(image_tensor) -> Tensor  # returns (B, L, 1280) visual features

composition: Lyra2WanModel *-- nn.Linear : patch_embedding (or nn.Conv3d if conv_patchify)

Lyra2WanModel.forward: 1. Optional: cat x with y_B_C_T_H_W (i2v conditioning)
9. for block in blocks: x = block(x, e, seq_lens, video_size, freqs, context, ...)
[Lyra2/FramePack path]: splits framepack chunks, processes with clean_patch_embeddings per chunk
Lyra2AttentionBlock.forward: 5. self_attn(y + cam_emb + buf_emb, ...) or self_attn(y, kq_bias=cam_emb+buf_emb) [inject_kq_only]

key_relationships: Lyra2WanModel does NOT subclass WanModel (copies logic inline)
Lyra2WanModel uses Lyra2AttentionBlock instead of WanAttentionBlock
Wan2pt1CLIPEmbLyra2 output feeds into Lyra2WanModel.forward as frame_cond_crossattn_emb_B_L_D
VideoRopePosition3DEmb generates RoPE freqs used by WanSelfAttention inside each Lyra2AttentionBlock
Camera conditioning (Plücker, 384ch) injected via Lyra2AttentionBlock.cam_encoder into self-attention
Cross-attention type determined by model_type: t2v_cross_attn vs i2v_cross_attn
important_notes: FramePack path vs base path selected in forward() based on kwargs keys presence
SAC (Selective Activation Checkpointing) wraps blocks at init
cam_dim=1536 when use_plucker_condition=True (384 input channels * 4 spatial subsampling)
VideoRopePosition3DEmb: dim split as h:w:t = 1/3:1/3:1/3 of head_dim, NTK extrapolation
MLPProj.emb_pos only present for flf2v; first/last frame positional embedding
